steps.t: Elsa is in the Agamaur camp. Radagast thanked you for your help and asked you to speak with the Eglain woman named Elsa.
The passage to Haragmar lies to the south. Ost Guruth is west of Haragmar. Elsa gave you a letter to deliver to Frideric requesting supplies for her e…
Frideric abides in the courtyard of Ost Guruth. Hana was pleased to receive the pack from Elsa, knowing that her sister is watching out for both her a…
